issue: Accurate but the stacked 'every 15 minutes from five minutes past the hour, every five hours from midnight through 8 p.m.' is hard to parse; consider 'at 5, 20, 35, and 50 minutes past the hour' to disambiguate the minute series.

Hour field 2/6 = 2,8,14,20, but 'every six hours from 2 a.m.' gives no upper bound, so a reader cannot recover that the last fire hour is 8 p.m. (unlike every other item). Fix: 'every six hours from 2 a.m. through 8 p.m.'

Month restriction 6-8 applies to BOTH or-branches, but the second-Monday branch reads 'on the second Monday of the month' with no month qualifier, implying it fires every month. Fix: 'or on the second Monday of the month in June through August' (cf. item 10).
